concepts.headline: Skip the gridlock. Save the planet.
concepts.subline: The premium electric commuter bike with long range.
concepts.rationale: High-contrast minimalist visual that instantly resonates with eco-conscious SoMa tech commuters stuck in traffic.

concepts.headline: Your new commute has no parking spot.
concepts.subline: Lightweight, app-unlocked, and built for daily city riders.
concepts.rationale: Directly targets the universal San Francisco frustration of parking with a premium, tech-forward aesthetic.
